CheckTitle: ECS instances should not use the default security group
Description: Ensure that ECS instances do not use the default security group, which may have overly permissive rules.
Risk: The default security group in Huawei Cloud may allow unrestricted traffic. Using it for ECS instances increases the risk of unauthorized network access.

Code.Other:
1. Log on to the Huawei Cloud console
2. Navigate to Elastic Cloud Server
3. Select the instance
4. Click More > Manage Security Group
5. Remove the default security group
6. Attach a custom security group with restrictive rules

Recommendation.Text: Create custom security groups with least-privilege rules and replace the default security group on all ECS instances.
